_comment: A REAL decision-provenance receipt signed by the live Fidacy engine for examples/decision-record.json (audit seq 158). Verify: (1) the JWS against https://api.fidacy.com/.well-known/jwks.json with typ fidacy-artifact-receipt+jws pinned; (2) sha256 of decision-record.json against the receipt's sha256 claim; (3) audit.seq against the Bitcoin-anchored checkpoint chain (https://fidacy-core.vercel.app/v1/anchor/latest, trail at fidacy.com/proof).

anchor_at_issuance.note: only the signature leg holds until the covering checkpoint

anchor_checkpoint.note: txid lands with Bitcoin confirmation; check /v1/anchor/latest
